title: Competitions
invitedHint: Open the competition below and tap Join when signed in with this email.
noCompetitions: No competitions in this tab yet.
signInToJoin: Sign in with Google from Profile to join or create competitions.
confirmDelete: Delete this competition? This cannot be undone.
errSignInGoogleFirst: Sign in with Google from your profile or a score page first.
errTargetScoreRange: Target score must be between 0 and 5.
errEditOwnOnly: You can only edit your own competition.
errMaxBelowParticipants: Max people cannot be below current participants ({count}).
errDeleteOwnOnly: You can only delete your own competition.
errSignInToJoin: Sign in to join a competition.
errValidEmailInvite: Enter a valid email to invite.
msgCreated: Competition created. You're on the board.
msgInviteSavedNoEmail: Invite saved. They can join when they sign in with that email, but the invite email could not be sent (check RESEND_API_KEY and APP_URL on the server).
editPageDescription: Update schedule, rules, and listing visibility.
editForbidden: Only the host can edit this competition.
editSignIn: Sign in to edit this competition.
glassesUnlimitedHint: Most submissions ranks by pour count; pours per person are unlimited.
pubListingsHintEdit: Shows this competition on that pub's detail page while it's active.
pubListingsHintCreate: Lists the competition on that pub's page while active.
newPageDescription: Set the schedule, win rule, and who can see it.
newPageSignIn: Sign in with Google from your profile to create a competition.
errCreateNoRow: Competition was created but we could not open it. Check your competitions list.
privateExplainer: Private: only you, participants, and invited emails see the competition. Add friends from Profile after they accept your request.
listError: Could not load competitions. Apply Supabase migrations including 20260328200000_competition_invites_fix_and_win_rules. ({detail})
noCompsYet: No competitions yet. Use New competition above to host one.
noOpenComps: No open or upcoming competitions. Check Past for finished ones.
inviteByEmailHint: They can join manually after signing up with that email. This does not add them as a friend or auto-join them.
addFriendsHint: Friends must be accepted in Profile first; then you can add them here.
deleteDescription: This cannot be undone. Invites and participant links for this competition will be removed.
dateDialogAria: Choose competition date range and times
dateHint: Pick the date range, then set start and end times (your device timezone).
locationHint: Search with Google Maps. Picking a result fills venue name and address. You can also type a name and confirm with "Use this name".
